content.en:
"How can it be so powerful?"

Lin'an Daozu couldn't believe it, the speed of this forbidden spear was too fast, and it locked on him, and he couldn't dodge it at all.

Wow!

A top-level Dao weapon armor appeared on his body, and a defensive supreme Dao technique was also cast.

As a casual cultivator, he is really not very wealthy, and he has no forbidden weapons at all, which is also one of the sorrows of casual cultivation.

Poof!!

The forbidden spear instantly pierced through his defenses, and even the top-level Dao weapon armor was pierced.

Under this blow, Lin'an Daozu was hit hard.

"One blow hit my !!"

Lin'an Dao Ancestor's eyes were full of fear when he looked at Ye Tian, this was the first time he had fought against such a terrifying Dao Ancestor.

In his impression, the only supreme Dao Ancestors who could have the ability to hit him hard with one blow were the Yan Ancestor and the Xuanhu Dao Ancestor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and the Heavenly Scale Dao Ancestor, the Heavenless Dao Ancestor and the Kunxing Dao Ancestor were not necessarily able to hit him hard with one blow.

Escape!

Lin'an Daozu was completely stunned and frightened.

Bang!!!

The forbidden realm descended, and the Ten Directions Void Fixing Technique of the Great Thousand Dao Technique was also displayed.

Although the power of the Great Thousand Dao Technique is not very strong, it is not very difficult to cooperate with the forbidden realm to restrain the Lin'an Dao Ancestor.

"Lin'an Dao Ancestor, since I broke through to the Supreme Dao Ancestor, I have never used the forbidden Dao technique I created on people, so I will use you as the object of my application today!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Forbidden Dao Technique!

When Lin'an Daozu heard this, his pupils shrank sharply, and he begged for mercy: "Dark King, don't kill me, I really didn't mean to compete with you for this forbidden treasure, it's yours!"

However, Ye Tian didn't listen to his nonsense, but instead cast the Dark Extreme Dao Spear.

It was extremely black, and the Dark Extreme Dao Spear containing the rules of the terrifying taboo was instantly condensed, carrying the terrifying forbidden power and penetrating away in an instant.

"No!"

Lin'an Daozu was terrified.

However, under one blow, Lin'an Daozu's body exploded and completely fell and died.

"I didn't expect that a top-notch Dao Ancestor like Lin'an Dao Ancestor would not be able to withstand my Forbidden Dao Technique with one blow!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, this also has something to do with the fact that Lin'an Daozu doesn't have a forbidden defensive weapon, if Lin'an Daozu has a forbidden defensive weapon and cultivates a supreme Dao technique to the extreme level, he can't kill him with a single blow.

However, he also has a clear understanding of his own strength.

At the very least, the average top-notch Dao Ancestor was not his one-hit enemy at all, and he could definitely kill him within two or three moves, or even kill him with one move.

Ye Tian casually put away the things of Lin'an Daozu, and took away this forbidden supreme orb.

He didn't go to determine the specific use of this bead, but quickly left the place and continued to search for the forbidden curiosity and the forbidden treasure.

For him, time is a forbidden treasure!

With the passage of time, a large number of forbidden strange things fell into the hands of these supreme Dao ancestors, and each of them gained a very rich harvest, but there were also some weaker supreme Dao ancestors who fell and died, but the number was relatively small.

After all, everyone is busy looking for forbidden strange objects and forbidden treasures, if the difference in strength is not very large, they will not fight at all, otherwise they will delay time and not kill the other party, and the forbidden strange things will be snatched away by other supreme Dao Ancestors.

Only in the face of the situation of Ye Tian and Lin'an Daozu, the difference in strength between the two sides is too big, and they will make a move.

A few days passed quickly.

At this time, this medium-sized forbidden forbidden strange thing in the Void Realm basically fell into the hands of the Supreme Dao Ancestors.

"More than 1 million forbidden curiosities!"

This is Ye Tian's harvest in three days, after all, this is almost picking up forbidden strange things, and the speed of collecting is naturally very fast, and there are a large number of top-level forbidden strange things, and he has also obtained eight forbidden treasures.

In the small Forbidden Void Realm, there are not many Forbidden Arcana, but in the Medium Forbidden Void Realm, there are quite a few Forbidden Arcana.

Now, although there are still some forbidden strange things in this forbidden void realm, the number must be very small.

"It's time to try to refine the Forbidden Void Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he began to gather the Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain.

Soon, a supreme Dao Ancestor named Black Wind Mountain came to his side.

On a majestic forbidden giant mountain, all the more than 100 supreme Dao Ancestors of Black Wind Mountain arrived, and only one fell, it is estimated that he was unlucky enough to meet a supreme Dao Ancestor like Yan Zu, and was instantly hit hard and even killed in seconds.

"I'm going to refine the Forbidden Void Realm, you guys are here to guard, if there is an enemy who is too strong, if you are not an opponent, I will strike again!"

Ye Tian ordered.

At this time, the Nirvana Dao Ancestor, who had never spoken much, spoke: "Dark King, let's just refine the Forbidden Void Realm like this? In this way, the Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple's supreme Dao Ancestors will all come to attack us, and in this way, we can't stop it at all! I suggest that we let the other forces try to refine the Forbidden Void Realm first, and then fight, we will wait for their strength to consume about the same, and then go to refine the Forbidden Void Realm, so that the success rate will be much greater!"

Ye Tian said coldly: "Nirvana Dao Ancestor, can you think of this method, can't other forces think of it? If you wait like this, how long will you have to wait? Moreover, once other forces dare to refine the Forbidden Void Realm, they must have a great deal of confidence. Similarly, since I dare to refine the Forbidden Void Realm, I naturally have a great deal of confidence!"

Nirvana Dao Ancestor didn't refute it, because it was useless to refute it.

At this time, Ye Tian took out the town boundary monument and sat on this mountain peak.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as the town boundary monument came out, with Ye Tian's urging, it began to suppress the forbidden rules of this void, and even spread to the origin of the medium-sized forbidden void realm, and began to invade the origin core little by little.

At the same time, part of Ye Tian's power began to refine the origin of the Forbidden Void Realm with the Town Boundary Monument.

When the Nirvana Dao Ancestors and other Supreme Dao Ancestors saw the Town Boundary Monument, they were immediately shocked, and they could also see that this Town Boundary Monument was definitely the best treasure in the refining world.

"Could it be that the two half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain gave it to him?"

Nirvana Dao Ancestor asked suspiciously.

But if you think about it carefully, it's not right, although the rules of Black Wind Mountain are not strict, they will not give treasures casually, let alone such precious treasures.

For example, when he was the King of the Sky, he had not been given any treasures from above, so it was unlikely that he would give Ye Tian such a treasure.

The Nirvana Dao Ancestor didn't think much about it, but concentrated on spying into the surrounding void to prevent a sneak attack from the Supreme Dao Ancestor.

Meanwhile.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace, the Heavenly Sea Sect, the Mitian Sect, and the Supreme Dao Ancestors of the Ten Thousand Domains Temple also knew that someone was refining the medium-sized forbidden void realm, and they were gathering one by one to go to Ye Tian's location.

And many of the supreme Dao Ancestors of the Scattered Cultivation or the Eight Heavenly Forces were also curious, and they also came over one by one, ready to take a peek at the upcoming battle situation.

If there's a bargain to pick up, they don't mind snatching it.
